description: A team needs to provide a sponsor with a report detailing all the times their logo was shown during last month's broadcasts, as required by their contract.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the sponsorship contract to understand the reporting requirements.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the contract requires a monthly fulfillment report.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the broadcast logs from the last month to find all instances where the sponsor's logo was displayed.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates a list of all timestamps when the logo appeared.

nodes.task_description: Create a formal sponsorship fulfillment report with the collected data.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent produces a detailed report for the sponsor.

nodes.task_description: Send the report to the sponsor.
